title: MikroTik GESP+POE-IN - Passive Gigabit PoE injector with surge protection, indoor
description: GESP+POE-IN is a passive Gigabit PoE injector with integrated Ethernet surge protection with one Ethernet port and on the other side is cable with RJ45 connector and ground cable terminated with a loop. This version is intended for indoor use on a port, on a switch or router that leads to an outdoor CPE unit The package also includes a wall plug with a screw and a special metal plate for attachment to a wall or rack
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Ethernet speed [Mb/s] 10/100/1000 Gigabit LAN Yes Power Pin powering 4,5 (+), 7,8 (-) PoE Out ports 1
